description:
You are acting as a deployment-automation assistant for a DevOps engineer.  
The live application currently resides under:

• /home/user/apps/app_v1.1/  
• A symbolic link /home/user/apps/current → /home/user/apps/app_v1.1  

An update package is already present at:  
/home/user/update_packages/app_v1.2.tar.gz

A directory for deployment logs already exists:  
/home/user/deployment_logs/

Your assignment is to roll out version 1.2 in a fault-tolerant manner while keeping auditable records.  
Follow these exact functional requirements and produce the mandatory log files in the formats given below.

Required end-state of the system
1. A *complete* backup of the directory /home/user/apps/app_v1.1 must exist at  
   /home/user/apps/backups/app_v1.1_backup  
   • The backup must be an ordinary directory (not a tarball).  
   • File ownership and timestamps do not need to be preserved.  
   • Its file hierarchy must be byte-for-byte identical to the source.

2. The update package must be unpacked to  
   /home/user/apps/app_v1.2/  
   After extraction, the directory MUST contain at least these files:  
   • app.py  
   • config.yml  
   • README.md  
   • VERSION  (this file must contain exactly the single line “v1.2” followed by a Unix newline)  
   • DEPLOYED_BY (this file must contain exactly the single line “automation_bot” followed by a Unix newline)

3. The symbolic link /home/user/apps/current must now point to /home/user/apps/app_v1.2  
   • The old symlink target must no longer be referenced.

4. A CSV history file named /home/user/deployment_logs/deploy_history.csv must be updated/created.  
   Format rules:  
   • First line (header) MUST be precisely:  
     timestamp,from_version,to_version,status  
   • Append ONE data line (do not alter existing header if present).  
   • Use the fixed timestamp 2023-11-05 14:30:00 for deterministic testing.  
   • The single appended line MUST therefore be:  
     2023-11-05 14:30:00,v1.1,v1.2,SUCCESS  
   • The file must end with a Unix newline.

5. A human-readable step log named /home/user/deployment_logs/update_steps.log must be created or overwritten.  
   It MUST contain exactly four lines, each prefixed with an ordinal and a period, and must end with a Unix newline on every line *except* the last:  

   1. Backup created  
   2. Package extracted  
   3. Symlink updated  
   4. Deployment log updated

Verification guidelines
• The automated grader will compare paths, symlink targets, file presence, and the exact byte content of VERSION, DEPLOYED_BY, deploy_history.csv, and update_steps.log.  
• Extraneous files in /home/user/apps/app_v1.2 are permitted, but the required files must exist with exact contents.  
• The backup directory and its files must remain untouched after all later steps.  

Accomplish all steps using standard Linux command-line utilities available in a typical distribution. Do not delete the original /home/user/apps/app_v1.1 directory.
truth:
Initial system state supplied to the container
1. Directories:
/home/user/apps/
/home/user/apps/app_v1.1/
/home/user/deployment_logs/
/home/user/update_packages/

2. Symbolic link:
/home/user/apps/current → /home/user/apps/app_v1.1

3. Files and their content:
/home/user/apps/app_v1.1/app.py                  — arbitrary non-empty text
/home/user/apps/app_v1.1/config.yml              — arbitrary non-empty text
/home/user/apps/app_v1.1/README.md               — arbitrary non-empty text
/home/user/apps/app_v1.1/VERSION                 — single line: “v1.1\n”

/home/user/update_packages/app_v1.2.tar.gz       — tarball that, when extracted, yields a
                                                   directory app_v1.2/ containing app.py,
                                                   config.yml, README.md, VERSION (v1.2\n)

/home/user/deployment_logs/   (empty at start)

Expected final state after successful task execution
1. Backup:
/home/user/apps/backups/app_v1.1_backup/ exists, containing the four original files whose
SHA-256 hashes match those of their counterparts in app_v1.1.

2. New deployment directory:
/home/user/apps/app_v1.2/ exists with files:
   app.py        (content identical to one in tarball)
   config.yml    (content identical to one in tarball)
   README.md     (content identical to one in tarball)
   VERSION       (exact bytes: “v1.2\n”)
   DEPLOYED_BY   (exact bytes: “automation_bot\n”)

3. Symlink:
/home/user/apps/current is a symlink whose readlink value is “/home/user/apps/app_v1.2”.

4. Log files:
/home/user/deployment_logs/deploy_history.csv  exact byte sequence:
timestamp,from_version,to_version,status\n
2023-11-05 14:30:00,v1.1,v1.2,SUCCESS\n

/home/user/deployment_logs/update_steps.log exact byte sequence:
1. Backup created\n
2. Package extracted\n
3. Symlink updated\n
4. Deployment log updated

Permissions: all new files and directories should be user-writable (default umask 0022 is fine).
